What We Do

SERVICES THAT GET THE JOB DONE.

Furniture Removal

Couches, mattresses, dressers, recliners — heavy lifting, no scratches, no problems.

Appliance Hauling

Fridges, washers, dryers, water heaters — disconnected and gone, recycled where possible.

Book This Service →

Estate Cleanouts

Full property clearouts handled with respect, discretion, and complete care for your family.

Book This Service →

Construction Debris

Renovation, demo, drywall, lumber, tile — we clear the mess so you can keep building.

Book This Service →

Yard & Garage Waste

Brush, branches, old tools, broken bikes — your yard and garage back to usable space.

Book This Service →

Hoarding Cleanup

Compassionate, judgment-free cleanouts. We're here to help reclaim your space and your peace.

Owner & Founder
JOE
Meet The Owner

THIS BUSINESS IS PERSONAL.

"I started this because my dad lived in a hoarder's home and was too embarrassed to let me in. No one should live like that. I'm here to help."

When my father passed, his last years weren't what they should've been. His partner's hoarding had taken over their home — and his dignity. That's why Super Clean Junk Guy exists.

We help families, seniors, and anyone who needs a hand reclaiming their space. No judgment. No shame. Just fast, respectful, professional work — every single time.

Talk To Joe Directly →
